---
name: Suggestion
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the mod
title: "Suggestion: [Short Description]"
labels: enhancement

---

### Suggestions

Example: Mekanism(MEK) mod is applicable for our mod, so we should add a support for their energy net.

示例：太阳能发电机的效率可以根据太阳高度角进行调整，增加游戏的真实感。

---

*If necessary, you can attach screenshots or videos (screen recording or phone video is both OK).*
